message:
Running command: python3 /tmp/fix_config.py 2>/dev/null || python3 - << 'PYEOF'
import json

config_path = '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json'

with open(config_path) as f:
    cfg = json.load(f)

cfg['FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS'] = False
cfg['SKIP_STEPS'] = ["OpenROAD.CTS"]
cfg['CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE'] = False
cfg['DRT_OPT_ITERS'] = 40
cfg['RUN_IRDROP_REPORT'] = False
cfg['MAGIC_EXT_USE_GDS'] = True

chip_v = '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v'
vf = cfg.get('VERILOG_FILES', [])
if chip_v not in vf:
    vf.insert(2, chip_v)
    cfg['VERILOG_FILES'] = vf

with open(config_path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(cfg, f, indent=4)

print("Done. VERILOG_FILES:", len(cfg['VERILOG_FILES']))
print("FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS:", cfg['FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS'])
print("SKIP_STEPS:", cfg['SKIP_STEPS'])
PYEOF

import json

config_path = '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json'

with open(config_path) as f:
    cfg = json.load(f)

cfg['FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS'] = False
cfg['SKIP_STEPS'] = ["OpenROAD.CTS"]
cfg['CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE'] = False
cfg['DRT_OPT_ITERS'] = 40
cfg['RUN_IRDROP_REPORT'] = False
cfg['MAGIC_EXT_USE_GDS'] = True

chip_v = '/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_chip.v'
vf = cfg.get('VERILOG_FILES', [])
if chip_v not in vf:
    vf.insert(2, chip_v)
    cfg['VERILOG_FILES'] = vf

with open(config_path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(cfg, f, indent=4)

print("Done. VERILOG_FILES:", len(cfg['VERILOG_FILES']))
print("FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS:", cfg['FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS'])
print("SKIP_STEPS:", cfg['SKIP_STEPS'])
PYEOF
